---
title: "BBB 26 — Economia"
subtitle: "A economia da casa: estalecas, compras, punições e quem paga a conta"
description: "A economia da casa: estalecas, compras, punições e quem paga a conta"
lang: pt-BR
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    body-classes: economia-page economia-v2-page
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import json
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from collections import Counter
from textwrap import dedent

import sys
sys.path.append(str(Path("scripts").resolve()))
from data_utils import (
    require_clean_manual_events, prepare_plotly_for_quarto, setup_bbb_dark_theme,
    load_balance_events, load_index_data, load_snapshots_full,
    load_participants_index, load_manual_events,
    avatar_img, genero, artigo,
    GROUP_COLORS,
)
prepare_plotly_for_quarto()
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go

require_clean_manual_events()
setup_bbb_dark_theme()


def emit(html: str) -> None:
    """Print HTML without leading indentation."""
    cleaned = "\n".join(line.lstrip() for line in dedent(html).splitlines())
    print(cleaned)
```

```{python}
#| label: load-data
#| include: false

# ── Load all data sources ──
bal_data = load_balance_events()
bal_events = bal_data.get("events", [])
bal_by_part = bal_data.get("by_participant", {})
weekly_summary = bal_data.get("weekly_summary", [])
compras_fairness = bal_data.get("compras_fairness", {})
cf_by_part = compras_fairness.get("by_participant", {})
cf_events = compras_fairness.get("events", [])
curiosities = compras_fairness.get("curiosities", [])
investigation_notes = compras_fairness.get("investigation_notes", [])

# ── Punishment deep dive (precomputed) ──
punishment_dd = bal_data.get("punishment_deep_dive", {})
recent_punishments = punishment_dd.get("recent_punishments", [])
who_lost_most = punishment_dd.get("who_lost_most", [])
severity_summary = punishment_dd.get("severity_summary", {})
tcn_analysis = punishment_dd.get("ta_com_nada_analysis", {})
balance_strip = punishment_dd.get("balance_strip", {})
vip_strip = punishment_dd.get("vip_strip", {})
latest_compras = compras_fairness.get("latest_compras", {})

index_data = load_index_data()
profiles = index_data.get("profiles", [])
leader_periods = index_data.get("leader_periods", [])

participants_idx = load_participants_index()
part_lookup = {}
for p in participants_idx.get("participants", []):
    part_lookup[p["name"]] = p

manual_events = load_manual_events()
special_events = manual_events.get("special_events", [])

snapshots, MEMBER_OF, AVATARS, daily_snapshots, late_entrants = load_snapshots_full()

# ── Computed KPIs ──
total_mesada = sum(
    sum(v for v in e["changes"].values() if v > 0)
    for e in bal_events if e["type"] == "mesada"
)
total_punicao = sum(
    sum(v for v in e["changes"].values() if v < 0)
    for e in bal_events if e["type"] == "punicao"
)
total_compras = sum(
    sum(v for v in e["changes"].values() if v < 0)
    for e in bal_events if e["type"] == "compras"
)
n_punicao_events = sum(1 for e in bal_events if e["type"] == "punicao")

# Most punished participant(s) — handle ties
pun_candidates = [(n, d) for n, d in bal_by_part.items() if d.get("n_punicoes", 0) > 0]
if pun_candidates:
    most_punished_n = max(d["n_punicoes"] for _, d in pun_candidates)
    most_punished_names = sorted(n for n, d in pun_candidates if d["n_punicoes"] == most_punished_n)
else:
    most_punished_n = 0
    most_punished_names = []

# Richest and poorest active
active_profiles = [p for p in profiles if p.get("active", True)]
if active_profiles:
    richest = max(active_profiles, key=lambda p: p.get("balance", 0))
    poorest = min(active_profiles, key=lambda p: p.get("balance", 0))
else:
    richest = poorest = None
```

```{python}
#| label: hero
#| output: asis

# Hero banner
emit(f'''
<div class="eco-hero">
<p class="eco-kicker">Economia da Casa</p>
<h2 class="eco-hero-title">A economia do BBB 26</h2>
<p class="eco-hero-subtitle">
Como os participantes gastam, perdem e acumulam estalecas — e o que isso revela sobre o jogo.
</p>
</div>
''')

# KPI cards
emit('<div class="eco-kpi-row">')
emit(f'''
<div class="eco-kpi eco-kpi--gold">
<p class="eco-kpi-value">{total_mesada:,}</p>
<p class="eco-kpi-label">Estalecas recebidas</p>
</div>
''')
emit(f'''
<div class="eco-kpi eco-kpi--red">
<p class="eco-kpi-value">{abs(total_punicao):,}</p>
<p class="eco-kpi-label">Perdido em punições</p>
</div>
''')
emit(f'''
<div class="eco-kpi eco-kpi--blue">
<p class="eco-kpi-value">{abs(total_compras):,}</p>
<p class="eco-kpi-label">Gasto em compras</p>
</div>
''')
emit(f'''
<div class="eco-kpi eco-kpi--green">
<p class="eco-kpi-value">{n_punicao_events}</p>
<p class="eco-kpi-label">Eventos de punição</p>
</div>
''')
if most_punished_names:
    kpi_names = ", ".join(n.split()[0] for n in most_punished_names)
    emit(f'''
    <div class="eco-kpi eco-kpi--red">
    <p class="eco-kpi-value">{most_punished_n}×</p>
    <p class="eco-kpi-label">Punições — {kpi_names}</p>
    </div>
    ''')
emit('</div>')

# Toggle + Jump nav
emit('''
<div class="eco-toggle-row">
<label class="eco-toggle">
<input type="checkbox" id="eco-toggle-elim" checked>
<span class="eco-toggle-slider"></span>
</label>
<span class="eco-toggle-label">Ocultar eliminados</span>
</div>
<div class="eco-jump-nav">
<a href="#curiosidades" class="eco-jump-link">💡 Curiosidades</a>
<a href="#ultima-compra" class="eco-jump-link">🛒 Última Compra</a>
<a href="#punicoes" class="eco-jump-link">🚨 Punições</a>
<a href="#evolucao-saldo" class="eco-jump-link">📈 Evolução</a>
<a href="#vip-xepa" class="eco-jump-link">🏠 VIP & Xepa</a>
<a href="#maquina" class="eco-jump-link">⚡ Máquina do Poder</a>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  var tog = document.getElementById("eco-toggle-elim");
  var body = document.body;
  // Default: hide eliminated
  body.classList.add("hide-eliminated");
  tog.addEventListener("change", function() {
    body.classList.toggle("hide-eliminated", tog.checked);
  });
})();
</script>
''')
```

# Curiosidades {#curiosidades}

```{python}
#| label: curiosidades
#| output: asis

CURIOSITY_LINKS = {
    "most_generous": "#ultima-compra",
    "least_generous": "#ultima-compra",
    "anomaly": "#ultima-compra",
    "vip_advantage": "#vip-xepa",
    "never_vip": "#vip-xepa",
    "most_punished": "#punicoes",
    "most_zeros": "#punicoes",
}
CURIOSITY_CFG = {
    "most_generous": {"emoji": "🏆", "title": "Mais generosa", "color": "#1a9850"},
    "least_generous": {"emoji": "🏖️", "title": "Menos generoso", "color": "#d73027"},
    "anomaly": {"emoji": "😱", "title": "Menor contribuição", "color": "#e6550d"},
    "vip_advantage": {"emoji": "💰", "title": "Vantagem VIP", "color": "#FFD700"},
    "never_vip": {"emoji": "🏠", "title": "Sempre Xepa", "color": "#888"},
    "most_punished": {"emoji": "🚨", "title": "Mais punida", "color": "#d73027"},
    "most_zeros": {"emoji": "💸", "title": "Mais vezes zerado", "color": "#e6550d"},
}

if curiosities:
    emit('<div class="eco-curiosity-grid">')
    for c in curiosities:
        ctype = c.get("type", "")
        cfg = CURIOSITY_CFG.get(ctype, {"emoji": "❓", "title": ctype, "color": "#666"})
        link = CURIOSITY_LINKS.get(ctype, "")
        name = c.get("name", "")
        detail = c["detail"]
        name_html = f" — <strong>{name}</strong>" if name else ""
        link_html = f' <a href="{link}" class="eco-curiosity-link">ver mais →</a>' if link else ""

        emit(f'''
        <div class="eco-curiosity-card" style="border-left-color: {cfg["color"]};">
        <p class="eco-curiosity-title">{cfg["emoji"]} {cfg["title"]}{name_html}</p>
        <p class="eco-curiosity-detail">{detail}{link_html}</p>
        </div>
        ''')
    emit('</div>')
```

# Última Compra da Semana {#ultima-compra}

```{python}
#| label: ultima-compra-pulse
#| output: asis

if latest_compras:
    lc = latest_compras
    cycle = lc.get("cycle", "?")
    total_spent = lc.get("total_spent", 0)
    house_pc = lc.get("house_per_capita_spent", 0)
    vip_pc = lc.get("vip_per_capita_spent", 0)
    xepa_pc = lc.get("xepa_per_capita_spent", 0)
    vip_total = lc.get("vip_total_spent", 0)
    xepa_total = lc.get("xepa_total_spent", 0)
    vip_n = lc.get("vip_n", 0)
    xepa_n = lc.get("xepa_n", 0)
    vip_delta = lc.get("vip_vs_own_avg_delta", 0)
    xepa_delta = lc.get("xepa_vs_own_avg_delta", 0)

    emit(f'''
    <p class="eco-v2-chapter-kicker">Semana {cycle} &middot; Compras da Casa</p>
    <div class="eco-v2-chapter-intro">
    <p class="eco-v2-chapter-copy">
    Na Semana {cycle}, a casa gastou <strong>{total_spent:,} estalecas</strong> no total.
    VIP ({vip_n}): <strong>{vip_total:,.0f}</strong> &middot; Xepa ({xepa_n}): <strong>{xepa_total:,.0f}</strong>.
    Per capita: VIP <strong>{vip_pc:,.0f}</strong> vs Xepa <strong>{xepa_pc:,.0f}</strong>.
    </p>
    </div>
    ''')

    vip_cls = "eco-v2-pulse-card--alto" if vip_delta >= 0 else "eco-v2-pulse-card--baixo"
    xepa_cls = "eco-v2-pulse-card--alto" if xepa_delta >= 0 else "eco-v2-pulse-card--baixo"
    vip_sign = "+" if vip_delta >= 0 else ""
    xepa_sign = "+" if xepa_delta >= 0 else ""

    emit(f'''
    <div class="eco-v2-pulse-grid">
    <div class="eco-v2-pulse-card eco-v2-pulse-card--vip {vip_cls}">
    <p class="eco-v2-pulse-title">VIP ({vip_n} pessoas)</p>
    <p class="eco-v2-pulse-value">{vip_total:,.0f}</p>
    <p class="eco-v2-pulse-detail">{vip_pc:,.0f}/pessoa &middot; {vip_sign}{vip_delta:,.0f} vs média</p>
    </div>
    <div class="eco-v2-pulse-card eco-v2-pulse-card--xepa {xepa_cls}">
    <p class="eco-v2-pulse-title">Xepa ({xepa_n} pessoas)</p>
    <p class="eco-v2-pulse-value">{xepa_total:,.0f}</p>
    <p class="eco-v2-pulse-detail">{xepa_pc:,.0f}/pessoa &middot; {xepa_sign}{xepa_delta:,.0f} vs média</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    ''')

    # Per-participant breakdown
    participants = lc.get("participants", [])
    if participants:
        active_set = {p["name"] for p in profiles if p.get("active", True)}
        emit('<div class="eco-card-grid">')
        for p in participants:
            name = p["name"]
            delta = abs(p["delta"])
            pct = p["pct_of_balance"]
            is_vip = p["vip"]
            is_active = name in active_set
            grupo = MEMBER_OF.get(name, "?")
            cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
            av_html = avatar_img(name, AVATARS, size=48, border_color=cor) if AVATARS.get(name) else ""
            vip_badge = '<span style="background:#FFD700;color:#000;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-size:var(--fs-xs);font-weight:700;margin-left:4px;">VIP</span>' if is_vip else ""
            pct_color = "#d73027" if pct > 80 else "#fee08b" if pct > 50 else "#1a9850"
            card_cls = "eco-participant-card" + ("" if is_active else " eco-participant-card--eliminated")
            elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if not is_active else ''

            emit(f'''
            <div class="{card_cls}"{elim_attr}>
            {av_html}
            <div class="eco-participant-info">
            <p class="eco-participant-name">{name}{vip_badge}</p>
            <p class="eco-participant-detail" style="color:{pct_color};">{pct:.0f}% do saldo</p>
            </div>
            <p class="eco-participant-value" style="color:#e6550d;">{delta:,}</p>
            </div>
            ''')
        emit('</div>')
else:
    print("*Dados da última compra indisponíveis.*")
```

```{python}
#| label: generosity-drilldown
#| output: asis

emit('<details class="eco-v2-drill"><summary class="eco-v2-drill-summary">Índice de Generosidade (histórico)</summary>')

if cf_by_part:
    active_names = {p["name"] for p in profiles if p.get("active", True)}

    vip_pcts_all = []
    xepa_pcts_all = []
    for ev in cf_events:
        for p in ev.get("participants", []):
            (vip_pcts_all if p["vip"] else xepa_pcts_all).append(p["pct_of_balance"])
    vip_avg = sum(vip_pcts_all) / len(vip_pcts_all) if vip_pcts_all else 0
    xepa_avg = sum(xepa_pcts_all) / len(xepa_pcts_all) if xepa_pcts_all else 0

    emit(f'''
    <div class="eco-narrative">
    <strong>VIP recebe o dobro de estalecas semanais (1.000 vs 500)</strong>, mas proporcionalmente contribui menos nas compras da semana.
    Em média, VIP gasta <strong>{vip_avg:.0f}%</strong> do saldo nas compras, contra <strong>{xepa_avg:.0f}%</strong> da Xepa — quem tem menos, paga mais.
    </div>
    ''')

    eligible = {n: d for n, d in cf_by_part.items() if d["n_compras"] >= 2}
    if eligible:
        sorted_gen = sorted(eligible.items(), key=lambda x: x[1]["avg_pct_of_balance"], reverse=True)
        max_val = max(d["avg_pct_of_balance"] for _, d in sorted_gen)

        emit('<p class="eco-bar-title">Índice de Generosidade nas Compras</p>')
        emit('<div class="eco-bar-chart">')
        for name, d in sorted_gen:
            v = d["avg_pct_of_balance"]
            w = (v / max_val * 100) if max_val > 0 else 0
            color = "#1a9850" if v >= 60 else "#fee08b" if v >= 30 else "#d73027"
            elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if name not in active_names else ''
            emit(f'''<div class="eco-bar-row"{elim_attr}>
            <span class="eco-bar-label">{name}</span>
            <div class="eco-bar-track"><div class="eco-bar-fill" style="width:{w:.1f}%;background:{color};"></div></div>
            <span class="eco-bar-value">{v:.0f}%</span>
            </div>''')
        emit('</div>')
        emit('<p style="text-align:center; color:#888; font-size:var(--fs-sm); margin-top:4px;">% médio do saldo usado nas compras da semana</p>')

emit('</details>')
```

```{python}
#| label: vip-xepa-compras-drilldown
#| output: asis

emit('<details class="eco-v2-drill"><summary class="eco-v2-drill-summary">VIP vs Xepa — Contribuição por Semana</summary>')

if cf_events:
    max_pct = max(max(e["vip_avg_pct"], e["xepa_avg_pct"]) for e in cf_events) or 1
    emit('<div class="eco-bar-chart">')
    for ev in cf_events:
        w = ev["cycle"]
        vip_pct = ev["vip_avg_pct"]
        xepa_pct = ev["xepa_avg_pct"]
        vip_w = vip_pct / max_pct * 100
        xepa_w = xepa_pct / max_pct * 100
        ratio_str = ""
        if vip_pct > 0:
            ratio = xepa_pct / vip_pct
            if ratio > 1:
                ratio_str = f"Xepa {ratio:.1f}x"

        emit(f'''<div class="eco-compras-week">
        <span class="eco-compras-week-label">W{w}</span>
        <div class="eco-compras-week-bars">
        <div class="eco-compras-bar-vip" style="width:{max(8, vip_w):.0f}%;">VIP {vip_pct:.0f}%</div>
        <div class="eco-compras-bar-xepa" style="width:{max(8, xepa_w):.0f}%;">Xepa {xepa_pct:.0f}%</div>
        </div>
        <span class="eco-compras-ratio">{ratio_str}</span>
        </div>''')
    emit('</div>')

emit('</details>')
```

# Multas e Prejuízo {#punicoes}

```{python}
#| label: punicoes-recent
#| output: asis

# ── Top 10 recent punishments ──
if recent_punishments:
    ss = severity_summary
    total_formal = ss.get("leve", 0) + ss.get("multipla", 0) + ss.get("gravissima", 0)

    emit(f'''
    <p class="eco-v2-chapter-kicker">Punições &middot; Últimas Ocorrências</p>
    <div class="eco-v2-chapter-intro">
    <p class="eco-v2-chapter-copy">
    <strong>{total_formal} punições formais</strong> ao longo do jogo —
    {ss.get("leve", 0)} leves &middot; {ss.get("multipla", 0)} múltiplas &middot; {ss.get("gravissima", 0)} gravíssimas.
    </p>
    </div>
    ''')

    # Who lost most (people strip)
    active_set = {p["name"] for p in profiles if p.get("active", True)}
    if who_lost_most:
        emit('<div class="eco-v2-people-strip">')
        for r in who_lost_most[:3]:
            name = r["name"]
            grupo = MEMBER_OF.get(name, "?")
            cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
            av_html = avatar_img(name, AVATARS, size=40, border_color=cor) if AVATARS.get(name) else ""
            elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if name not in active_set else ''
            emit(f'''
            <div class="eco-v2-person-chip eco-v2-person-chip--alert"{elim_attr}>
            {av_html}
            <div>
            <p class="eco-v2-person-name">{name}</p>
            <p class="eco-v2-person-meta">{abs(r["formal_punishment_total"]):,} estalecas em {r["formal_punishment_count"]} punições</p>
            </div>
            </div>
            ''')
        emit('</div>')

    # Recent punishments list
    emit('<div class="eco-recent-list">')
    for r in recent_punishments:
        name = r["name"]
        date = r["game_date"][5:]  # MM-DD
        amount = r["amount"]
        sev = r["severity"]
        grupo = MEMBER_OF.get(name, "?")
        cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
        av_html = avatar_img(name, AVATARS, size=32, border_color=cor) if AVATARS.get(name) else ""
        badge_cls = f'eco-severity-badge eco-severity-badge--{sev["bucket"]}'
        elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if name not in active_set else ''

        emit(f'''
        <div class="eco-recent-item"{elim_attr}>
        <span class="eco-recent-date">{date}</span>
        {av_html}
        <span class="eco-recent-name">{name}</span>
        <span class="eco-recent-amount">{amount:,}</span>
        <span class="{badge_cls}">{sev["label"]}</span>
        </div>
        ''')
    emit('</div>')
else:
    print("*Nenhuma punição registrada.*")
```

```{python}
#| label: punicoes-bar-drilldown
#| output: asis

emit('<details class="eco-v2-drill"><summary class="eco-v2-drill-summary">Ranking completo de punições</summary>')

pun_data = [(n, d["n_punicoes"]) for n, d in bal_by_part.items() if d.get("n_punicoes", 0) > 0]
if pun_data:
    pun_data.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    max_pun = pun_data[0][1] if pun_data else 1

    active_set = {p["name"] for p in profiles if p.get("active", True)}
    emit('<p class="eco-bar-title">Punições por Participante</p>')
    emit('<div class="eco-bar-chart">')
    for name, v in pun_data:
        w = (v / max_pun * 100) if max_pun > 0 else 0
        color = "#d73027" if v >= 3 else "#fee08b" if v >= 2 else "#888"
        elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if name not in active_set else ''
        emit(f'''<div class="eco-bar-row"{elim_attr}>
        <span class="eco-bar-label">{name}</span>
        <div class="eco-bar-track"><div class="eco-bar-fill" style="width:{w:.1f}%;background:{color};"></div></div>
        <span class="eco-bar-value">{v}×</span>
        </div>''')
    emit('</div>')

emit('</details>')
```

```{python}
#| label: punicoes-timeline-drilldown
#| output: asis

punicao_events = [e for e in bal_events if e["type"] == "punicao"]
if punicao_events:
    emit('<details class="eco-v2-drill"><summary class="eco-v2-drill-summary">Linha do tempo por semana</summary>')
    by_week = {}
    for e in punicao_events:
        w = e["cycle"]
        by_week.setdefault(w, []).append(e)

    for w in sorted(by_week):
        evts = by_week[w]
        total_w = sum(sum(v for v in e["changes"].values() if v < 0) for e in evts)
        n_evts = len(evts)
        emit(f'''<details style="margin: 8px 0; border: 1px solid #444; border-radius: 6px;">
        <summary style="padding: 10px 14px; cursor: pointer; background: #222; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 600;">
        🚨 Semana {w} — {n_evts} punição{"ões" if n_evts != 1 else ""}, {total_w:,} estalecas
        </summary>
        <div style="padding: 8px 14px; font-size: var(--fs-md);">''')
        for e in evts:
            date = e["game_date"]
            changes = ", ".join(f"{n}: {v:,}" for n, v in e["changes"].items())
            subtype = e.get("subtype", "")
            label = f' <span style="color:#ffe08a;">({subtype})</span>' if subtype else ""
            emit(f'<p style="margin:4px 0; color:#ccc;">{date}{label} — {changes}</p>')
        emit('</div></details>')
    emit('</details>')
```

```{python}
#| label: ta-com-nada-drilldown
#| output: asis

# Tá-com-nada cycles + zero-balance cards (absorbed from Quem Zerou)
tcn_parts = [(n, d.get("ta_com_nada_dates", [])) for n, d in bal_by_part.items()
             if d.get("ta_com_nada_dates")]
negative_parts = [(p["name"], p.get("balance", 0)) for p in profiles if p.get("balance", 0) < 0]

if tcn_parts:
    emit('<details class="eco-v2-drill"><summary class="eco-v2-drill-summary">Quem zerou e ciclos de recuperação</summary>')

    tcn_parts.sort(key=lambda x: len(x[1]), reverse=True)
    top_count = len(tcn_parts[0][1])
    top_names = [n for n, d in tcn_parts if len(d) == top_count]
    if len(top_names) == 1:
        lead_text = f'{top_names[0].split()[0]} lidera com <strong>{top_count} vezes</strong> zerado.'
    else:
        lead_text = f'{", ".join(n.split()[0] for n in top_names)} empatam com <strong>{top_count} vezes</strong> zerados.'
    narr = (
        f'<strong>{len(tcn_parts)} participantes</strong> já ficaram com saldo zero ou negativo. '
        f'{lead_text}'
    )
    if negative_parts:
        neg_names = ", ".join(f"{n} ({v:,})" for n, v in sorted(negative_parts, key=lambda x: x[1]))
        narr += f'<br>⚠️ Atualmente no vermelho: {neg_names}.'
    emit(f'<div class="eco-narrative">{narr}</div>')

    # Cycle recovery analysis
    if tcn_analysis:
        emit('<p style="margin:12px 0 6px; font-weight:700; color:#d8e1ee;">Ciclos entre zeros:</p>')
        emit('<div class="eco-v2-people-strip">')
        for name, data in sorted(tcn_analysis.items(), key=lambda x: x[1]["avg_gap"]):
            grupo = MEMBER_OF.get(name, "?")
            cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
            av_html = avatar_img(name, AVATARS, size=40, border_color=cor) if AVATARS.get(name) else ""
            gaps_str = " → ".join(f"{g} sem" for g in data["gaps_in_cycles"])
            emit(f'''
            <div class="eco-v2-person-chip eco-v2-person-chip--alert">
            {av_html}
            <div>
            <p class="eco-v2-person-name">{name}</p>
            <p class="eco-v2-person-meta">{len(data["dates"])}× zerou · {gaps_str} · média {data["avg_gap"]} sem</p>
            </div>
            </div>
            ''')
        emit('</div>')

    # Zero-balance cards
    emit('<div class="eco-card-grid">')
    for name, dates in tcn_parts:
        is_active = part_lookup.get(name, {}).get("active", True)
        card_cls = "eco-participant-card" + ("" if is_active else " eco-participant-card--eliminated")
        avatar = AVATARS.get(name, "")
        grupo = MEMBER_OF.get(name, "?")
        cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
        av_html = avatar_img(name, AVATARS, size=48, border_color=cor) if avatar else ""
        exit_label = f' <span class="eco-exit-label">(saiu)</span>' if not is_active else ""

        cur_bal = next((p.get("balance", 0) for p in profiles if p["name"] == name), 0)
        bal_color = "#d73027" if cur_bal < 0 else "#888" if cur_bal == 0 else "#66bd63"
        bal_str = f"Saldo atual: {cur_bal:,}" if cur_bal != 0 else "Saldo atual: 0"

        elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if not is_active else ''
        emit(f'''
        <details class="{card_cls}" style="cursor:pointer;"{elim_attr}>
        <summary style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; list-style:none;">
        {av_html}
        <div class="eco-participant-info">
        <p class="eco-participant-name">{name}{exit_label}</p>
        <p class="eco-participant-detail" style="color:{bal_color};">{bal_str}</p>
        </div>
        <p class="eco-participant-value" style="color: #e6550d;">{len(dates)}×</p>
        </summary>
        <div style="padding: 6px 12px 10px; font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: #aaa;">
        <p style="margin:2px 0;">📅 Datas em que zerou:</p>
        {"".join(f'<span style="display:inline-block;background:#333;padding:2px 8px;margin:2px;border-radius:4px;font-size:var(--fs-md);">{d}</span>' for d in sorted(dates))}
        </div>
        </details>
        ''')
    emit('</div>')
    emit('</details>')
```

# Evolução do Saldo {#evolucao-saldo}

```{python}
#| label: balance-strip
#| output: asis

top_gainers = balance_strip.get("top_gainers", [])
top_losers = balance_strip.get("top_losers", [])

if top_gainers or top_losers:
    active_set = {p["name"] for p in profiles if p.get("active", True)}
    emit('<div class="eco-v2-people-strip">')
    for g in top_gainers:
        name = g["name"]
        grupo = MEMBER_OF.get(name, "?")
        cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
        av_html = avatar_img(name, AVATARS, size=40, border_color=cor) if AVATARS.get(name) else ""
        elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if name not in active_set else ''
        emit(f'''
        <div class="eco-v2-person-chip"{elim_attr}>
        {av_html}
        <div>
        <p class="eco-v2-person-name">{name}</p>
        <p class="eco-v2-person-meta" style="color:#23b26d;">+{g["net"]:,} net</p>
        </div>
        </div>
        ''')
    for l in reversed(top_losers):
        name = l["name"]
        grupo = MEMBER_OF.get(name, "?")
        cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
        av_html = avatar_img(name, AVATARS, size=40, border_color=cor) if AVATARS.get(name) else ""
        elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if name not in active_set else ''
        emit(f'''
        <div class="eco-v2-person-chip eco-v2-person-chip--alert"{elim_attr}>
        {av_html}
        <div>
        <p class="eco-v2-person-name">{name}</p>
        <p class="eco-v2-person-meta" style="color:#e45555;">{l["net"]:,} net</p>
        </div>
        </div>
        ''')
    emit('</div>')
```

📈 **Dado acumulado** — Evolução do saldo de cada participante ao longo do tempo.

```{python}
#| label: late-caption-balance
#| output: asis

if late_entrants:
    _by_d = {}
    for n, d in late_entrants.items():
        _by_d.setdefault(d, []).append(n)
    _parts = [f"{', '.join(sorted(ns))} (entraram em {d})" for d, ns in sorted(_by_d.items())]
    print(f'<p class="text-muted small">⚠️ Participantes que entraram depois: {"; ".join(_parts)}</p>')
```

```{python}
#| label: balance-timeline

balance_data = []
for i, snap in enumerate(snapshots):
    for p in snap['participants']:
        if p.get('characteristics', {}).get('eliminated'):
            continue
        balance_data.append({
            'Data': pd.to_datetime(snap['date']),
            'Participante': p['name'],
            'Saldo': p.get('characteristics', {}).get('balance', 0),
            'Grupo': p.get('characteristics', {}).get('memberOf', '?')
        })

df_balance = pd.DataFrame(balance_data)

if not df_balance.empty:
    all_bal = sorted(df_balance['Participante'].unique())
    palette_bal = (px.colors.qualitative.Plotly + px.colors.qualitative.D3 +
                   px.colors.qualitative.Set2 + px.colors.qualitative.Bold)
    bal_colors = {name: palette_bal[i % len(palette_bal)] for i, name in enumerate(all_bal)}

    latest_bal = df_balance.groupby('Participante')['Saldo'].last()
    top3_bal = set(latest_bal.nlargest(3).index)
    bottom3_bal = set(latest_bal.nsmallest(3).index)
    hl_bal = top3_bal | bottom3_bal

    fig = go.Figure()
    for name in all_bal:
        df_p = df_balance[df_balance['Participante'] == name].sort_values('Data')
        is_hl = name in hl_bal
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=df_p['Data'], y=df_p['Saldo'], mode='lines+markers', name=name,
            line=dict(width=3 if is_hl else 1.5, color=bal_colors[name]),
            marker=dict(size=6 if is_hl else 4),
            hovertemplate=f'{name}: ' + '%{y:,} Estalecas<extra></extra>',
            visible=True if is_hl else 'legendonly',
        ))

    # Balance event annotations
    seen_dates = set()
    for ev in bal_events:
        if ev["game_date"] in seen_dates:
            continue
        if ev["type"] == "mesada":
            fig.add_vline(x=ev["game_date"], line_dash="dot", line_color="#1a9850",
                          line_width=1, opacity=0.4)
            seen_dates.add(ev["game_date"])
        elif ev["type"] == "compras":
            fig.add_vline(x=ev["game_date"], line_dash="dot", line_color="#e6550d",
                          line_width=1, opacity=0.4)
            seen_dates.add(ev["game_date"])

    fig.update_layout(
        title="Evolução do Saldo (Estalecas)",
        xaxis_title="", yaxis_title="Saldo (Estalecas)",
        height=600, hovermode='x unified',
        legend=dict(
            font=dict(size=9),
            itemsizing='constant',
            orientation='h',
            yanchor='top', y=-0.12,
            xanchor='center', x=0.5,
        ),
        margin=dict(b=140),
    )
    fig.show()
```

```{python}
#| label: ranking-cards
#| output: asis

emit('<details class="eco-v2-drill"><summary class="eco-v2-drill-summary">Ranking de saldo</summary>')

# All profiles sorted by balance (active first, then eliminated)
all_profiles = sorted(profiles, key=lambda p: p.get("balance", 0), reverse=True)
active_sorted = [p for p in all_profiles if p.get("active", True)]
exited_sorted = [p for p in all_profiles if not p.get("active", True)]

emit('<div class="eco-card-grid">')
for i, p in enumerate(active_sorted + exited_sorted, 1):
    name = p["name"]
    balance = p.get("balance", 0)
    grupo = p.get("group", "")
    is_active = p.get("active", True)
    cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
    avatar = AVATARS.get(name, "")
    av_html = avatar_img(name, AVATARS, size=48, border_color=cor) if avatar else ""

    card_cls = "eco-participant-card" + ("" if is_active else " eco-participant-card--eliminated")
    exit_label = f' <span class="eco-exit-label">(saiu)</span>' if not is_active else ""

    if balance > 1000:
        val_color = "#1a9850"
    elif balance > 0:
        val_color = "#66bd63"
    elif balance == 0:
        val_color = "#888"
    else:
        val_color = "#d73027"

    # Enrichment
    n_pun = bal_by_part.get(name, {}).get("n_punicoes", 0)
    gen_data = cf_by_part.get(name, {})
    gen_pct = gen_data.get("avg_pct_of_balance")
    pun_str = f"🚨×{n_pun}" if n_pun > 0 else ""
    gen_str = f"🛒 {gen_pct:.0f}%" if gen_pct is not None else ""
    detail_parts = [s for s in [pun_str, gen_str, grupo] if s]

    elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if not is_active else ''
    emit(f'''
    <div class="{card_cls}"{elim_attr}>
    {av_html}
    <div class="eco-participant-info">
    <p class="eco-participant-name">{name}{exit_label}</p>
    <p class="eco-participant-detail">{" · ".join(detail_parts)}</p>
    </div>
    <p class="eco-participant-value" style="color:{val_color};">{balance:,}</p>
    </div>
    ''')
emit('</div>')
emit('</details>')
```

# VIP & Xepa {#vip-xepa}

```{python}
#| label: vip-strip
#| output: asis

most_vip = vip_strip.get("most_vip", [])
never_vip_list = vip_strip.get("never_vip", [])

if most_vip or never_vip_list:
    active_set = {p["name"] for p in profiles if p.get("active", True)}
    emit('<div class="eco-v2-people-strip">')
    for v in most_vip:
        name = v["name"]
        grupo = MEMBER_OF.get(name, "?")
        cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
        av_html = avatar_img(name, AVATARS, size=40, border_color=cor) if AVATARS.get(name) else ""
        elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if name not in active_set else ''
        emit(f'''
        <div class="eco-v2-person-chip"{elim_attr}>
        {av_html}
        <div>
        <p class="eco-v2-person-name">{name}</p>
        <p class="eco-v2-person-meta" style="color:#d9b131;">{v["vip_count"]} dias VIP</p>
        </div>
        </div>
        ''')
    for nv in never_vip_list[:3]:
        name = nv["name"]
        grupo = MEMBER_OF.get(name, "?")
        cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
        av_html = avatar_img(name, AVATARS, size=40, border_color=cor) if AVATARS.get(name) else ""
        elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if name not in active_set else ''
        emit(f'''
        <div class="eco-v2-person-chip eco-v2-person-chip--alert"{elim_attr}>
        {av_html}
        <div>
        <p class="eco-v2-person-name">{name}</p>
        <p class="eco-v2-person-meta">Nunca VIP</p>
        </div>
        </div>
        ''')
    emit('</div>')
```

```{python}
#| label: vip-narrative
#| output: asis

if leader_periods:
    n_periods = len(leader_periods)
    # Count never-VIP active participants
    vip_ever = set()
    for lp in leader_periods:
        vip_ever.update(lp.get("vip", []))
    active_names = {p["name"] for p in profiles if p.get("active", True)}
    never_vip = active_names - vip_ever
    emit(f'''
    <div class="eco-narrative">
    <strong>{n_periods} períodos de liderança</strong> definiram quem ficou no VIP (1.000 estalecas/semana) e quem ficou na Xepa (500).
    {f"<strong>{len(never_vip)} participante{'s' if len(never_vip) != 1 else ''}</strong> nunca foi VIP: {', '.join(sorted(never_vip))}." if never_vip else "Todos já passaram pelo VIP ao menos uma vez."}
    </div>
    ''')
```

```{python}
#| label: vip-heatmap
#| output: asis

emit('<details class="eco-v2-drill"><summary class="eco-v2-drill-summary">Tabela VIP/Xepa por período</summary>')

if not leader_periods:
    print("*Nenhum período de liderança registrado.*")
else:
    all_names_set = set()
    for lp in leader_periods:
        all_names_set.update(lp["vip"])
        all_names_set.update(lp["xepa"])

    vip_count = Counter()
    for lp in leader_periods:
        for n in lp["vip"]:
            vip_count[n] += 1

    sorted_names = sorted(all_names_set, key=lambda n: (-vip_count.get(n, 0), n))

    # HTML table — horizontally scrollable, sticky first column
    emit('<div style="overflow-x:auto; max-width:100%;">')
    emit('<table class="eco-vip-table">')

    # Header: leader names
    emit('<thead><tr><th>Participante</th>')
    for lp in leader_periods:
        leader = lp.get("leader", "?")
        short = " + ".join(n.split()[0] for n in lp.get("leaders", [leader]))
        emit(f'<th>👑 {short}<br><sub>{lp["start"][5:]}</sub></th>')
    emit('</tr></thead><tbody>')

    active_set = {p["name"] for p in profiles if p.get("active", True)}
    for name in sorted_names:
        elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if name not in active_set else ''
        emit(f'<tr{elim_attr}><td>{name.split()[0]}</td>')
        for lp in leader_periods:
            if name in lp["vip"]:
                emit('<td class="eco-vip-cell--vip">VIP</td>')
            elif name in lp["xepa"]:
                emit('<td class="eco-vip-cell--xepa">Xepa</td>')
            else:
                emit('<td class="eco-vip-cell--fora">Fora</td>')
        emit('</tr>')

    emit('</tbody></table></div>')
emit('</details>')
```

```{python}
#| label: vip-bar
#| output: asis

if not leader_periods:
    print("*Nenhum período de liderança registrado.*")
else:
    vip_count = Counter()
    xepa_count = Counter()
    all_names_set = set()
    for lp in leader_periods:
        for n in lp["vip"]:
            vip_count[n] += 1
            all_names_set.add(n)
        for n in lp["xepa"]:
            xepa_count[n] += 1
            all_names_set.add(n)

    sorted_names = sorted(all_names_set, key=lambda n: (-vip_count.get(n, 0), xepa_count.get(n, 0), n))
    n_periods = len(leader_periods)

    active_set = {p["name"] for p in profiles if p.get("active", True)}
    emit(f'<p class="eco-bar-title">VIP vs Xepa ({n_periods} períodos de liderança)</p>')
    emit('<div class="eco-bar-chart">')
    for name in sorted_names:
        vc = vip_count.get(name, 0)
        xc = xepa_count.get(name, 0)
        total = vc + xc
        vip_w = (vc / n_periods * 100) if n_periods > 0 else 0
        xepa_w = (xc / n_periods * 100) if n_periods > 0 else 0
        elim_attr = ' data-eliminated' if name not in active_set else ''
        emit(f'''<div class="eco-vip-count-row"{elim_attr}>
        <span class="eco-vip-count-label">{name}</span>
        <div class="eco-vip-count-bars">
        <div class="eco-vip-count-vip" style="width:{vip_w:.0f}%;"></div>
        <div class="eco-vip-count-xepa" style="width:{xepa_w:.0f}%;"></div>
        </div>
        <span class="eco-vip-count-nums"><span>{vc}×</span> <span>{xc}×</span></span>
        </div>''')
    emit('</div>')
    emit('<p style="text-align:center; color:#888; font-size:var(--fs-sm); margin-top:4px;"><span style="color:#f1c40f;">■</span> VIP <span style="color:#7f8c8d;">■</span> Xepa</p>')
```

```{python}
#| label: vip-detail
#| output: asis

if leader_periods:
    emit('<details class="eco-v2-drill"><summary class="eco-v2-drill-summary">Detalhe por período de liderança</summary>')
    emit('<div style="max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">')
    for i, lp in enumerate(leader_periods):
        leader = lp.get("leader") or "Sem Líder"
        start = lp["start"][5:]
        end = lp["end"][5:]
        leader_av = avatar_img(leader, AVATARS, size=32) if AVATARS.get(leader) else ""

        emit(f'''<details style="margin: 8px 0; border: 1px solid #444; border-radius: 6px;">
        <summary style="padding: 10px 14px; cursor: pointer; background: #222; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 600;">
        {leader_av} 👑 {leader} ({start} → {end}) — VIP: {len(lp["vip"])} | Xepa: {len(lp["xepa"])}
        </summary>
        <div style="padding: 8px 14px; font-size: var(--fs-md); color: #ccc;">
        <p><strong>VIP ({len(lp["vip"])}):</strong> {", ".join(lp["vip"])}</p>
        <p><strong>Xepa ({len(lp["xepa"])}):</strong> {", ".join(lp["xepa"])}</p>
        </div></details>''')
    emit('</div>')
    emit('</details>')
```

# A Máquina do Poder {#maquina}

```{python}
#| label: maquina-do-poder
#| output: asis

# Find Máquina do Poder in special events (dynamic lookup)
maquina_event = None
for se in special_events:
    if se.get("type") == "dinamica" and "quina" in se.get("name", "").lower():
        maquina_event = se
        break

if maquina_event:
    # Also look for detailed data in cycles[] maquina_do_poder
    cycles_ev = manual_events.get("cycles", [])
    maquina_detail = None
    for we in cycles_ev:
        if we.get("maquina_do_poder"):
            md = we["maquina_do_poder"]
            if md.get("date") == maquina_event.get("date"):
                maquina_detail = md
                break

    ev_date = maquina_event.get("date", "?")
    resultado = maquina_event.get("resultado", "")

    emit(f'''
    <div class="eco-narrative">
    <strong>⚡ {maquina_event.get("name", "Dinâmica Especial")}</strong> ({ev_date}) — uma dinâmica que custou estalecas
    e deu um poder real no jogo. {resultado[:200] if len(resultado) > 200 else resultado}
    </div>
    ''')

    if maquina_detail and maquina_detail.get("compras"):
        compras = maquina_detail["compras"]
        vencedor = maquina_detail.get("vencedor", "")
        poder = maquina_detail.get("poder", "")

        emit('<div class="eco-maquina-card">')
        emit('<h4>🎰 Compras na Máquina</h4>')

        # Show balance changes from the event
        maquina_bal = [e for e in bal_events
                       if e["game_date"] == ev_date
                       and e["type"] in ("punicao", "dinamica")
                       and any(n in (maquina_event.get("participants_affected", []))
                               for n in e["changes"])]
        bal_changes = {}
        for e in maquina_bal:
            for n, v in e["changes"].items():
                if n in maquina_event.get("participants_affected", []):
                    bal_changes[n] = bal_changes.get(n, 0) + v

        for name, items in compras.items():
            cost = bal_changes.get(name, 0)
            cost_str = f' <span style="color:#d73027;">({cost:,} estalecas)</span>' if cost else ""
            items_str = ", ".join(items) if isinstance(items, list) else str(items)
            is_winner = name == vencedor
            winner_badge = ' <span style="color:#f1c40f;">🏆</span>' if is_winner else ""
            emit(f'''
            <div class="eco-maquina-item">
            <span><strong>{name}</strong>{winner_badge}: {items_str}</span>
            <span>{cost_str}</span>
            </div>
            ''')

        if vencedor and poder:
            emit(f'''
            <div class="eco-maquina-winner">
            🏆 {vencedor} — {poder}
            </div>
            ''')
        emit('</div>')
else:
    emit('''
    <div class="eco-narrative eco-narrative--method">
    Nenhuma dinâmica especial envolvendo estalecas registrada até o momento.
    </div>
    ''')
```

# Metodologia {#metodologia}

```{python}
#| label: investigation-notes
#| output: asis

if investigation_notes:
    emit('''<details style="margin: 12px 0; border: 1px solid #444; border-radius: 6px;">
    <summary style="padding: 10px 14px; cursor: pointer; background: #222; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 600;">
    🔍 Notas de Investigação ({} anotações)
    </summary>
    <div style="padding: 8px 14px; font-size: var(--fs-md); color: #aaa;">'''.format(len(investigation_notes)))
    for note in investigation_notes:
        emit(f'<p style="margin:4px 0;">W{note["cycle"]} ({note["date"]}): {note["note"]}</p>')
    emit('</div></details>')
```

```{python}
#| label: methodology
#| output: asis

# Weekly detail (compras breakdown) in expandable
if cf_events:
    emit('''<details style="margin: 12px 0; border: 1px solid #444; border-radius: 6px;">
    <summary style="padding: 10px 14px; cursor: pointer; background: #222; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 600;">
    📋 Detalhe por Semana (compras)
    </summary>
    <div style="padding: 8px 14px; overflow-x: auto;">''')

    for ev in cf_events:
        total = ev["total_spent"]
        n = ev["n_participants"]
        w = ev["cycle"]
        vip_pct = ev["vip_avg_pct"]
        xepa_pct = ev["xepa_avg_pct"]

        emit(f'''<details style="margin: 6px 0; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 4px;">
        <summary style="padding: 8px 12px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--fs-md);">
        Semana {w} — {total:,} estalecas ({n} participantes)
        <span style="color: #FFD700; font-size: var(--fs-sm);">VIP {vip_pct:.0f}%</span> /
        <span style="color: #888; font-size: var(--fs-sm);">Xepa {xepa_pct:.0f}%</span>
        </summary>
        <div style="padding: 6px 12px;">
        <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size: var(--fs-sm);">
        <thead><tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #555;">
        <th style="text-align:left; padding:4px 8px;">Participante</th>
        <th style="text-align:right; padding:4px 8px;">Saldo Antes</th>
        <th style="text-align:right; padding:4px 8px;">Gastou</th>
        <th style="text-align:right; padding:4px 8px;">% do Saldo</th>
        <th style="text-align:center; padding:4px 8px;">Status</th>
        </tr></thead><tbody>''')

        for p in ev["participants"]:
            pct = p["pct_of_balance"]
            pct_color = "#d73027" if pct > 80 else "#fee08b" if pct > 50 else "#1a9850"
            vip_badge = '<span style="background:#FFD700;color:#000;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-size:var(--fs-xs);font-weight:700;">VIP</span>' if p["vip"] else '<span style="color:#888;font-size:var(--fs-xs);">Xepa</span>'

            emit(f'''<tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #333;">
            <td style="padding:4px 8px;">{p["name"]}</td>
            <td style="text-align:right; padding:4px 8px;">{p["pre_balance"]:,}</td>
            <td style="text-align:right; padding:4px 8px;">{abs(p["delta"]):,}</td>
            <td style="text-align:right; padding:4px 8px; color:{pct_color}; font-weight:600;">{pct:.0f}%</td>
            <td style="text-align:center; padding:4px 8px;">{vip_badge}</td>
            </tr>''')

        emit('</tbody></table></div></details>')

    emit('</div></details>')

# Methodology footer
emit('''
<div class="eco-narrative eco-narrative--method" style="margin-top: 16px;">
<strong>📐 Metodologia</strong> — Valores inferidos a partir de diferenças de saldo entre snapshots da API
(estalecas antes vs depois). Contribuições individuais nas compras coletivas não são publicadas pelo programa —
os valores aqui são estimativas baseadas nos dados disponíveis. Anomalias documentadas nas notas de investigação.
</div>
''')
```
